languages.text: "Я всего-то на минуту отошел! Вот он, мой пост, вот он, в поле зрения!" {n}Яруб тычет рукой в сторону госпиталя.{/n} "Я тут дольше с вами препираюсь, господин капитан, а мог бы уже вернуться в караул!"

"I only stepped away for a minute! My post is right there, you can see it from here!" {n}Jarub points in the direction of the infirmary.{/n} "If I hadn't stood here arguing with you, Master Captain, I could've been back on guard duty by now!"
languages.original_text: "Я всего-то на минуту отошел! Вот он, мой пост, вот он, в поле зрения!" {n}Яруб тычет рукой в сторону госпиталя.{/n} "Я тут дольше с вами препираюсь, господин капитан, а мог бы уже вернуться в караул!"

traits.locale_text: "I only stepped away for a minute! My post is right there, you can see it from here! {n}Jarub points in the direction of the infirmary.{/n} "If I hadn't stood here arguing with you, Master Captain, I could've been back on guard duty by now!"

"I only stepped away for a minute! My post is right there, you can see it from here! {n}Jarub points in the direction of the infirmary.{/n} "If I hadn't stood here arguing with you, Master Captain, I could've been back on guard duty by now!"

"I only stepped away for a minute! My post is right there, you can see it from here! {n}Jarub points in the direction of the infirmary.{/n} "If I hadn't stood here arguing with you, Master Captain, I could've been back on guard duty by now!"

languages.text: «¡Solo me alejé un momento! ¡Mi puesto está ahí mismo; se ve desde aquí!». {n}Jarub señala en dirección a la enfermería.{/n} «¡De no estar aquí discutiendo con usted, maestro capitán, ya estaría haciendo guardia otra vez!».
languages.original_text: "I only stepped away for a minute! My post is right there, you can see it from here!" {n}Jarub points in the direction of the infirmary.{/n} "If I hadn't stood here arguing with you, Master Captain, I could've been back on guard duty by now!"

traits.locale_text: «¡Solo me alejé un momento! ¡Mi puesto está ahí mismo; se ve desde aquí!». {n}Jarub señala en dirección a la enfermería.{/n} «¡De no estar aquí discutiendo con usted, maestro capitán, ya estaría haciendo guardia otra vez!».

languages.text: “我才走开了一分钟！我的哨位就在那儿，从这里都看得见！”{n}雅鲁布指着医务室的方向。{/n}“上尉大人，要不是站在这儿跟您争论，我现在都回去站岗了！”
languages.original_text: "I only stepped away for a minute! My post is right there, you can see it from here!" {n}Jarub points in the direction of the infirmary.{/n} "If I hadn't stood here arguing with you, Master Captain, I could've been back on guard duty by now!"

traits.locale_text: “我才走开了一分钟！我的哨位就在那儿，从这里都看得见！”{n}雅鲁布指着医务室的方向。{/n}“上尉大人，要不是站在这儿跟您争论，我现在都回去站岗了！”

languages.text: « Je me suis absenté une petite minute à peine ! Mon poste est juste là, on le voit d'ici ! » {n}Jarub indique la direction de l'infirmerie.{/n} « Si on avait pas perdu notre temps à se chicaner, maître capitaine, j'aurais repris du service il y a un bon moment déjà ! »
languages.original_text: "I only stepped away for a minute! My post is right there, you can see it from here!" {n}Jarub points in the direction of the infirmary.{/n} "If I hadn't stood here arguing with you, Master Captain, I could've been back on guard duty by now!"

traits.locale_text: « Je me suis absenté une petite minute à peine ! Mon poste est juste là, on le voit d'ici ! » {n}Jarub indique la direction de l'infirmerie.{/n} « Si on avait pas perdu notre temps à se chicaner, maître capitaine, j'aurais repris du service il y a un bon moment déjà ! »

languages.text: "Bir dakikalığına görev yerimden ayrılıverdim! Hemen şurada zaten, buradan görülüyor!" {n}Jarub, revirin olduğu yönü işaret ediyor.{/n} "Yüzbaşı, burada durup sizinle tartışıyor olmasaydım şimdiye dek nöbetime dönmüş olurdum!"
languages.original_text: "I only stepped away for a minute! My post is right there, you can see it from here!" {n}Jarub points in the direction of the infirmary.{/n} "If I hadn't stood here arguing with you, Master Captain, I could've been back on guard duty by now!"

traits.locale_text: "Bir dakikalığına görev yerimden ayrılıverdim! Hemen şurada zaten, buradan görülüyor!" {n}Jarub, revirin olduğu yönü işaret ediyor.{/n} "Yüzbaşı, burada durup sizinle tartışıyor olmasaydım şimdiye dek nöbetime dönmüş olurdum!"

languages.text: "Ich war nur eine Minute weg! Mein Posten ist genau dort, man kann ihn von hier sehen!" {n}Jarub zeigt in Richtung Krankenstation.{/n} "Hätte ich nicht hier mit Euch diskutiert, Meister Captain, wäre ich längst wieder auf meinem Posten!"
languages.original_text: "I only stepped away for a minute! My post is right there, you can see it from here!" {n}Jarub points in the direction of the infirmary.{/n} "If I hadn't stood here arguing with you, Master Captain, I could've been back on guard duty by now!"

traits.locale_text: "Ich war nur eine Minute weg! Mein Posten ist genau dort, man kann ihn von hier sehen!" {n}Jarub zeigt in Richtung Krankenstation.{/n} "Hätte ich nicht hier mit Euch diskutiert, Meister Captain, wäre ich längst wieder auf meinem Posten!"

languages.text: 「たった1分だけ離れただけなのに！私の番はすぐそこ、ここから見えるわ！{n}ジャラブは療養所のほうを指さす.{/n}「もし私がここであなたと議論していなければ、マスター・キャプテン、もう番に戻っていたのに！」
languages.original_text: "I only stepped away for a minute! My post is right there, you can see it from here! {n}Jarub points in the direction of the infirmary.{/n} "If I hadn't stood here arguing with you, Master Captain, I could've been back on guard duty by now!"

traits.locale_text: 「たった1分だけ離れただけなのに！私の番はすぐそこ、ここから見えるわ！{n}ジャラブは療養所のほうを指さす.{/n}「もし私がここであなたと議論していなければ、マスター・キャプテン、もう番に戻っていたのに！」
